caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan in the Western Caribbean is experiencing moderate winds up to 24 kt with wave heights reaching 5.4 ft and a dominant swell from the ENE at an 8-second period. There is a 31% rain probability today, while St. Lucia in the Lesser Antilles sees lighter winds near 11 kt and less impactful marine conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Expected in Venice Amid Light Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing light winds up to 10 kt with waves reaching 1.4 ft and an ENE swell period of 3 seconds. Rain probability is high at 76%, indicating significant precipitation likely throughout the day.
